metadata.lyrics:
[00:41.45] You don't even know me
[00:44.33] You say that I'm not livin' right
[00:48.97] You don't understand me
[00:51.67] So why do you judge my life?
[00:56.45] I don't ask for nothing
[00:59.56] I'm always holding my own
[01:03.26] Everytime I turn around, there's something
[01:06.95] People talkin' 'bout what they don't know
[01:11.27] And when I try to move on up
[01:14.52] They're always pullin' me down
[01:18.09] I'm tired yeah and I had enough
[01:21.53] It's my life and I livin' it now
[01:24.55] You don't know me
[01:25.74] You don't even know me (you don't know me)
[01:28.58] You say that I'm not livin' right
[01:33.03] You don't understand me
[01:35.92] So why do you judge my life?
[01:40.54] I always wonder why
[01:43.50] People try to hurt me
[01:47.38] No happiness in their own lives
[01:51.27] So they act out all their jealousy
[01:54.92] Who are you to say that I'm livin' wrong?
[01:58.43] Always telling me what to do
[02:02.42] I decide, yeah, I gotta be strong
[02:05.81] What makes you think that I needed you?
[02:08.79] You don't know me
[02:10.01] You don't even know me (oh, you don't know me)
[02:12.83] You say that I'm not livin' right (you don't understand the way that I feel)
[02:17.57] You don't understand me (you can't even see my pain)
[02:20.25] So why do you judge my life? (Oh)
[02:24.92] You don't even know me (you don't even know)
[02:27.42] You say that I'm not livin' right (what I've been going through)
[02:32.38] You don't understand me (tell me, who are you?)
[02:34.99] So why do you judge my life? (So why do you judge my life?)
[02:39.24] 
[02:50.20] Who are you?
[02:53.13] You say I'm not livin'right
[02:56.86] Anything I try to do
[03:00.46] You haven't walked in my shoes
[03:05.99] I'm gonna move on
[03:08.62] It's my life, it's my life
[03:12.48] It's my life, it's my life
[03:16.08] It's my life, it's my life
[03:19.67] 
[03:27.66] You don't even know me
[03:30.23] You say that I'm not livin' right (you don't understand)
[03:35.13] You don't understand me
[03:37.64] So why do you judge my life? (Everything I try to do, oh)
[03:42.57] You don't even know me (all you do is talk about)

[03:49.89] You don't understand me (and about my problems)
